chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.318 and 319 of 2023 Umar Baloch Enterprises (Pvt.) Ltd. Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on application under section 151 CPC. 2. For orders on exemption applications. 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on stay applications. Dated: 08.04.2024 Mr. Muhammad Ali Lakhani for appellant. Mr. Ahmed Masood along with Mr. Muhammad Altaf for respondents No.4 and 5 on statutory notice. -.-.- Learned counsel for appellant submits that he has been instructed by the appellant not to press these two appeals along with listed applications. Instant High Court Appeals are accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with pending applications. Judge Judge
